features.name: signed_multiply_with_unsigned_result_width
features.description: Code should include a multiplication between a signed variable and an unsigned variable where the result is assigned to a signed wider type

features.name: signed_cast_on_unsigned_sized_expression
features.description: Code should include $signed() applied to a zero-extended bit slice cast of an unsigned value used in signed multiplication

features.name: width_extension_of_signed_before_multiply
features.description: Code should include a signed variable cast to wider width before multiplying with an unsigned value

features.name: sign_extended_multiply_operand
features.description: Code should include multiplication using a pre-created sign-extended operand of an unsigned value
